title: oplismenus undulatifolius var. japonicus
intro: Oplismenus undulatifolius var. japonicus, also known as Japanese basket grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches, and promoting wound healing. In traditional Japanese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it is also used in herbal preparations such as tinctures and poultices.
